case_title: VINCE NEUWIRTH ET AL VS. NICKEL SHON

docket_entries.description: RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHBITIS TRANSFERRED)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS FILED BY DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) IS GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER DISMISSING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-31-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS VINCE NEUWIRTH & IONA DELIA NEUWIRTH, BOTH DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NICKEL SHONE, DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED JUL-07-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY NEUWIRTH, VINCE DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY NEUWIRTH UJICA, IOANA DELIA DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECIEVED DEFENDANT EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT)
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2016 DISMISSED - NO APPEARANCE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,232.00 FILED BY NEUWIRTH, VINCE DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY NEUWIRTH UJICA, IOANA DELIA DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DEPUTIES WERE UNABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANTS - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 80.00 - SERVED AUG-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATED FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEUWIRTH, VINCE DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY NEUWIRTH UJICA, IOANA DELIA DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,595.00, "DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS OVERRULED. THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT DEFENDANT INSISTED ON A PARTICULAR MANNER OF DELIVERY OF THE SAFES, TOGETHER WITH THE PLAINTIFFS IN ATTENDANCE. GIVEN THESE CIRCUMSTANCES, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT BORE THE RISK OF DAMAGE TO THE SAFES EN ROUTE. THE COURT CREDITS MOST, BUT NOT ALL, OF PLAINTIFFS CLAIMED DAMAGES" PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT SHON, NICKEL DBA THUNDERBIRD MOUNTAIN COMPANY MAILED TO RESPONDENT NEUWIRTH, VINCE DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY NEUWIRTH UJICA, IOANA DELIA DBA INTERNATIONAL SAFE COMPANY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR NOV-03-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF NOV-01-2016
